stages.name: explore
stages.description: Breadth-first link discovery and crawling

stages.name: join
stages.description: Follow links for each row using HTTP (wget)

stages.name: wgetJoin
stages.description: Follow links using the wgetJoin primitive

stages.name: wgetExplore
stages.description: Breadth-first crawling using the wgetExplore primitive

stages.name: visit
stages.description: Fetch a URL from a column using browser automation (JavaScript-rendered)

stages.name: wget
stages.description: Fetch a URL from a column using HTTP

stages.name: visitJoin
stages.description: Follow links using browser automation for each row

stages.name: visitExplore
stages.description: Breadth-first crawling using browser automation

stages.name: extract
stages.description: Extract fields using selector-map configuration

args.name: extractors
args.description: List of {selector, method, as} extractor maps

stages.name: flatSelect
stages.description: Segment HTML block and create one row per segment (requires example-plugin)

args.name: extractors
args.description: Extractor maps applied inside each segment

stages.example:
- stage: flatSelect
  args:
    - "div.product"
    - - { selector: "h3", method: "text", as: "name" }

stages.name: intelligent_explore
stages.description: Like explore, but uses LLM to infer selector from natural language prompt

args.name: prompt
args.description: Natural language description of target links

stages.name: intelligent_join
stages.description: Join with LLM-inferred selector and actions

stages.name: iextract
stages.description: LLM extraction on HTML block with chunking, produces multiple columns
stages.example:
- stage: iextract
  args: ["Extract product title, price and sku", "prod_"]

stages.name: intelligent_flatSelect
stages.description: Segmentation and multi-row extraction with LLM-inferred selector (uses template caching + RoadRunner)
stages.example:
- stage: intelligent_flatSelect
  args: ["product cards", "extract name and price", "product"]

stages.name: intelligentExtract
stages.description: LLM-powered ad-hoc extraction from an HTML field (row transform)
stages.example:
- stage: intelligentExtract
  args: ["description_html", "Extract brand and model", "llm_json"]

stages.name: intelligent_table
stages.description: Placeholder stage for LLM table extraction (currently no-op)

stages.name: echo
stages.description: Debug helper; writes _echo column

stages.name: cache
stages.description: Persist the current dataset in Spark memory (equivalent to .cache())

stages.name: store
stages.description: Save the current dataset under a label for multi-source composition

args.name: label
args.description: Label to store the dataset under

stages.name: reset
stages.description: Start fresh with an empty dataset (for multi-source composition)

stages.name: union_with
stages.description: Union the current dataset with one or more stored labels

args.name: labels
args.description: One or more stored dataset labels to union

stages.name: dedup
stages.description: Deduplicate rows. With no args: full-row distinct. With args: deduplicate by key columns

stages.name: filter_country
stages.description: Keep only rows whose country field is in the allowed list

stages.name: sentiment
stages.description: Simple lexicon-based sentiment analysis; adds sentiment and count columns

stages.name: aggregatesentiment
stages.description: Reduce-by-key aggregation; sums sentiment and count by key

stages.name: avg_sentiment_by_key
stages.description: Group-by-key and compute average sentiment into avg_sentiment

stages.name: sentiment_monthly
stages.description: Macro-stage: runs sentiment, derives month from date, then aggregates by month

stages.name: sum_sales
stages.description: Reduce-by-key aggregation; sums numeric sales by country

stages.name: load_csv
stages.description: Load a CSV file into the pipeline (creates new dataset)

args.name: pathOrOptions
args.description: Path string or {path, header, inferSchema, ...} map

stages.name: save_csv
stages.description: Save current dataset as CSV and continue pipeline

stages.name: load_union
stages.description: Load multiple datasets and union them by column name (allowMissingColumns=true)

stages.name: unionByName
stages.description: Union the current dataset with external datasets loaded from specs

stages.name: load_avro
stages.description: Load an Avro file into the pipeline

stages.name: load_delta
stages.description: Load a Delta Lake table into the pipeline

stages.name: load_iceberg
stages.description: Load an Apache Iceberg table into the pipeline

stages.name: load_bigquery
stages.description: Load a BigQuery table into the pipeline

stages.name: load_mongodb
stages.description: Load a MongoDB collection into the pipeline

stages.name: load_kafka
stages.description: Load from a Kafka topic into the pipeline

stages.name: searchEngine
stages.description: Search by EAN using a provider (Google Custom Search / Bing) and optionally enrich results

args.name: config
args.description: {provider, ean, num_results, image_search, enrich, api_key, cx, as}

stages.example:
- stage: searchEngine
  args:
    - provider: "google"
      ean: "$ean"
      num_results: 10

stages.name: socialAPI
stages.description: Fetch JSON from social/financial APIs with auth via header or query param

args.name: config
args.description: {provider, endpoint, params, auth_token, method, body, as}

stages.example:
- stage: socialAPI
  args:
    - provider: "twitter"
      endpoint: "tweets/search/recent"
      auth_token: "${TWITTER_BEARER_TOKEN}"
      as: "tweets_json"

stages.name: eurostatAPI
stages.description: Fetch Eurostat REST API JSON

stages.name: istatAPI
stages.description: Fetch ISTAT SDMX JSON

stages.name: enrichMatchingScore
stages.description: Recalculate matching score based on input fields and iextract output prefix

stages.name: imageSimilarity
stages.description: Evaluate image similarity scores using LLM + heuristics

stages.name: priceNormalize
stages.description: Normalize price strings into price_numeric, price_currency, and price_<currency>

stages.name: oddsNormalize
stages.description: Convert odds to odds_decimal

stages.name: propertyNormalize
stages.description: Compute area_sqm and price_per_sqm

stages.name: realEstateArbitrage
stages.description: Compute simple z-score outliers (arbitrage_z, is_arbitrage) from price_per_sqm

stages.name: propertyCluster
stages.description: Cluster real-estate listings using unsupervised learning (KMeans/DBSCAN). Produces cluster_id

stages.name: propertyClusterML
stages.description: Cluster using KMeans or GMM (ML variant)

stages.name: python_row_transform
stages.description: Apply a registered Python row transform function. Use python_row_transform:<function_name> syntax

stages.name: technicalIndicators
stages.description: Compute technical indicators for financial time series

stages.name: fundamentalAnalysis
stages.description: Compute fundamental analysis metrics

stages.name: portfolioDataPrep
stages.description: Prepare data for portfolio analysis

stages.name: surebetFinder
stages.description: Find arbitrage opportunities in betting odds data

actions.name: click
actions.description: Click on an element matching a CSS selector or natural-language description

params.name: target
params.description: CSS selector or natural language description of the element to click

examples: click on the first product link

actions.name: type
actions.description: Type text into an input field (clears the field first)

params.name: target
params.description: Target input element (selector or natural language)

examples: type 'Italy' in the country field then press Enter

actions.name: scroll
actions.description: Scroll the page or an element to trigger lazy-loading or pagination

params.name: amount
params.description: Pixels to scroll, or 'bottom' for full scroll (default: one viewport)

examples: scroll down to load more products
scroll to the bottom of the page

actions.name: wait
actions.description: Wait for an element to appear, a condition to be met, or a fixed time

params.name: target
params.description: CSS selector, natural language condition, or milliseconds

actions.name: select
actions.description: Select an option from a <select> dropdown element

params.name: value
params.description: Option value or visible text to select

examples: choose 'Highest price' from the sort by dropdown

actions.name: hover
actions.description: Hover the mouse over an element to trigger tooltip, menu or lazy-load
examples: hover on the main menu item to open submenu

actions.name: navigate
actions.description: Navigate the browser to a specific URL or relative path

params.name: url
params.description: Absolute URL, relative path, or $column reference

actions.name: submit
actions.description: Submit a form by pressing Enter or clicking the submit button

params.name: target
params.description: Form or submit button selector (optional — defaults to active form)

actions.name: eval
actions.description: Execute arbitrary JavaScript in the page context for advanced interactions

params.name: script
params.description: JavaScript expression or statement to execute in the browser

actions.name: none
actions.description: No action — use when the stage should navigate/collect without any prior interaction
